category_title: Resistant students who verbalize a dislike for English and complain of boredom
minimal_context: The student is using the VoiceThread online system to read aloud and record simple summarizing sentences during the storytelling session.
dialogue:
TUTOR: Now it is time to use the VoiceThread system to read aloud and record the simple summarizing sentences.

STUDENT: This is boring. I don't want to do this.

TUTOR: Just look at the screen and give it a try.

STUDENT: (Looks particularly nervous) I am not doing it.

TUTOR: You need to press the record button and read the sentence now.

STUDENT: No! I would not come if I had to do recording!

options.A: Shift focus to progressive and methodical tuning of awareness to each body part before recording.
options.B: Show the icon of each member on the same page of the VoiceThread system.
options.C: Remain a silent observer and passive participant, making no comments on the student's refusal.
options.D: Use poems aimed at promoting reflection and reinforcement of mindfulness concepts during the session.
